name: another-brain
description: Local-first browser-side dialog runtime for efishother.com.

scripts.check: npm run check:release && python3 scripts/validate_distillation.py && python3 scripts/eval_tiny_router.py && python3 scripts/eval_dialog_persona.py && python3 scripts/validate_context_stress_cases.py && node scripts/eval_context_stress_node.mjs --min-context-ratio 0.98 --max-failures 0 --out artifacts/training_os/context_stress_report.json && node scripts/run_model_gate_node.mjs --out artifacts/training_os/model_inference_report.json
